event: The end of Kali Yuga — abstract cosmic dissolution
description: An abstract composition with a large blue central space framed by dark zigzag or stepped shapes at top and bottom, resembling the silhouette of a city or fortress. Small dark stick-like figures tumble and float through the blue space in various contorted poses, some wielding small objects. The style is graphic and surreal, with sharp geometric edges contrasting with the chaotic movement of the figures. A small green circle sits at the lower left.
